questionHtml:
A force acts on an object of mass 40 kg. The graph shows how the acceleration a of the object varies with its displacement d.

What is the work done by the force on the object?

A. 50 J

B. 2000 J

C. 2400 J

D. 3200 J

meta.title: A force acts on an object of mass 40 kg. The graph shows how the acceleration a of the object varies with its displacement d. What is the work done by the force on the object? A. 5
